## [00:00 - 02:25]

Money follows attention. You want to know what's sexy? Well, besides my amazing wife, stats are sexy, especially when you've got sales growth like this. I'm here to tell you, if you aren't tracking your statistics on a weekly, daily, even, an hourly basis, you're leaving tons of money on the table. My name's Grant Cardone, and most people don't know this about me, but I'm an absolute fanatic about statistics. I've known today as the top sales and marketing trainer in the world, but let me be crystal clear on one thing. If you don't know how to track and read statistics, both online and offline, all the sales and marketing in the world won't ever matter. And here's the thing, most business owners and managers already know they should be tracking their metrics. It's not rocket science, it's business 101. The reality is though, it ain't easy. If it was, you would have done it a long time ago. Well, not to worry, because we're about to make this as absolutely painless for you as possible. I'm going to break it all down for you. What are stats? What KPIs are? And what you should be tracking? What systems you should be using to actually track your KPIs? And most importantly, how do you use the information to grow and scale your business? And you're going to find all this and way more inside the 10x Statistics system. This is the simplest, most comprehensive business growth program ever created. When you download my statistics manual, you'll immediately know what is needed to run your company by the numbers. You'll become crystal clear on what strategies to use, what mistakes to avoid, and what steps you need to build a well-oiled machine. You'll also be getting my step-by-step video tutorials. So even if you don't know the first thing about statistics, you just follow the steps and do exactly what I did. You're also getting my flow charts to help you visualize how to structure and utilize your data. You'll be getting my checklist to make sure you also set things up right and then continually optimize and improve. And most importantly, you're getting my real-world swipe files to show you how we structure our reports here at my company and how to use those stats to absolutely dominate. Look, you don't need to be a genius to run your business with statistics. You just need to do what is proven to work. So enough talk. Let's get down to running your business with statistics. Jump into the scene and let's get you growing your business the way you deserve. Thanks for watching.
